name: @agentic30/agnt
description: Agent-friendly CLI for solo developer tool discovery and curriculum

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm && node -e "const f=require('fs');const c=f.readFileSync('dist/index.js','utf8');f.writeFileSync('dist/index.js','#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c)" && chmod +x dist/index.js

author: October Academy
